creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #8)

> Hmm, interesting (and a good point).  Out of curiosity, which are those systems?

Recently I found an example: SunOS 4.11 does not have grep -E or grep -F, but it does have egrep and fgrep.  So can we remove the bogus warnings already?
